title: Golden Dense Vietnamese Duck Banh Xeo
description: Savory Vietnamese dish featuring duck sauce and deep-fried ingredients, served with fresh herbs and sweet sauce. This energizing meal is perfect for lunch or dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together rice flour and water to make a smooth batter.
Add duck sauce, coconut milk, and a pinch of salt to the batter and mix well.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and pork to the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add bean sprouts to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour the batter into the pan and cook until the bottom is golden brown, about 4 minutes.
Loosen the banh xeo with a spatula and flip it over to cook the other side.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the other side is also golden brown.
Remove the banh xeo from the pan and place it on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the banh xeo hot with fresh herbs and sweet sauce.
